Title: Mardi Gras World Events

URL Source: https://www.eventticketscenter.com/mardi-gras-world-new-orleans-tickets/625443/e

Markdown Content:
# Mardi Gras World Events

[Skip to main content](https://www.eventticketscenter.com/mardi-gras-world-new-orleans-tickets/625443/e#contentStart)[Accessibility Policy & Feedback](https://www.eventticketscenter.com/accessibility/1189/h)

 Resale marketplace, prices may be above face value.

### Mardi Gras World Seating Information

Mardi Gras World has a total capacity of 20,000. However, this figure can vary for events with unique venue configurations.

Mardi Gras World, located in New Orleans, Louisiana, offers a variety of seating options for different budgets and preferences. Here's a breakdown of the main sections:

**Floor Seating**

*   **Standard Floor Seats**: These seats offer a close view of the stage. They are typically arranged in rows and are available on a first-come-first-served basis.
*   **VIP Floor Seats**: These premium seats are located closest to the stage, and often include additional benefits like priority entry and exclusive merchandise.

**Grandstand Seating**

*   These seats offer a raised view of the stage, providing a comprehensive view of the performance. They are typically located towards the back of the venue.

**Balcony Seating**

*   **Standard Balcony Seats**: These seats offer a view from above, allowing for a unique perspective of the performance.
*   **Box Seats**: Located in the balcony, these private boxes provide a more exclusive experience. They typically come with extra amenities like waiter service and a private restroom.

**Standing Room**

*   This area is designed for guests who prefer to stand during the performance. The standing room is typically located at the back of the venue, offering a clear view of the stage.

At Mardi Gras World, ticket holders can choose from a range of seating options to enjoy a unique and unforgettable experience.

## Mardi Gras World Events

Tickets to Mardi Gras World events are available now at Event Tickets Center! Oftentimes, Mardi Gras World shows are difficult to come by. But, Event Tickets Center has a variety of tickets available for the next several events at the venue. Prices start at $14, but can range all the way up to $1005. So, you need to act fast before ticket prices rise. If you are on the fence about going to see a Mardi Gras World event, we have conveniently laid out some of the most important information about the venue. Check out insider information about parking, concessions, seating, rideshare, public transportation, bag policy, amenities, and more! Find the event you want to attend in the event list above, so you can purchase your tickets to go see your next Mardi Gras World event live!

### Mardi Gras World Schedule

Mardi Gras World is the hub for several events. The venue serves as the stage for museum events, in addition to hosting other functions.

## Mardi Gras World Experience

### Getting to a Show at Mardi Gras World

Mardi Gras World is located at 1380 Port of New Orleans Place, New Orleans, Louisiana, 70130. We've got you covered with all the options to get there, from public transportation to convenient rideshares.

**Mardi Gras World Rideshare Drop-off and Pickup Location**

At Mardi Gras World, there are specific pick-up locations for rideshare users. You’ll find the designated pick-up spots at Port of New Orleans Place. Using rideshare to attend an event is a great option because it eliminates the stress of finding parking, which can often be scarce and expensive. Additionally, ridesharing promotes safety by providing reliable transportation if you plan on consuming alcohol during your visit.

**Closest Bus Stop to Mardi Gras World**

For a budget-friendly option, the nearest bus stop is located at Magazine at Terpsichore.

**Arrival Times for Mardi Gras World?**

Arrival times may vary depending on the event, but we recommend arriving at the venue about an hour before the scheduled start time. This gives you some breathing room in case of traffic congestion, parking difficulties, visits to the merchandise store, or if you want to grab some food and drinks before the event starts.

### Visit Mardi Gras World

When you come to an event at Mardi Gras World, please make sure to bring your ticket and a valid ID, especially if you want to purchase alcohol. We recommend bringing a credit or debit card and also a little cash. Because this is an indoor venue, weather is often not a factor. However, as it is climate-controlled, it might be worth bringing a light jacket just in case it gets a little chilly inside.

Want to ensure a smooth entry to Mardi Gras World? We've got you covered! From security to accessibility, we've compiled all the info you need for a hassle-free arrival.

**Mardi Gras World Bag Policy & Prohibited Items**

Clear bags are strongly encouraged for quick inspection and enhanced security, as they provide visibility of contents, speeding up entry. If a clear bag isn’t feasible, opaque bags should be around clutch size or at least fit comfortably under a seat; oversized bags and backpacks may not be allowed inside. Prohibited items may include weapons, illegal substances, outside food, hazardous materials, and disruptive items.

**Mardi Gras World Accepted Payment Methods**

Mardi Gras World primarily operates on a cashless basis. This implies that while some vendors may still accept cash, most onsite purchases are done with digital wallets or debit and credit cards. Although Mardi Gras World accepts most credit cards (such as Visa and Mastercard), it is prudent to carry a small amount of cash for tipping and for the few vendors that might accept it inside and outside the venue.
